response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song as 'Fire Fire' by IRyS. Searched for lyrics using 'IRyS Fire Fire lyrics' and found them on Lyrics.com. 2. Identified the second song title as 'Auto-fister' by the duo of the same name (Gigi Murin and Cecilia Immergreen). This appears to be an original song for the duo. I am using the title 'Auto-fister' and will note the lyrics are based on the performance in the video as a precise official release was not found in the initial search.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive English VTubers. First, IRyS performs her original song 'Fire Fire'. Then, after a short introduction, the duo 'Auto-fister' (composed of VTubers Gigi Murin and Cecilia Immergreen) performs their song 'Auto-fister'.

scenes.description: IRyS performs 'Fire Fire' on a stage with flames and screens displaying the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Iris fire
(Rhy-val! Rhy-val!)
Before you fall, let me take you on a trip
My zone, on twilight, lit
Iris fire off the hip, hoppin'
Angels got you feeling hip
On that, all I need is this, all I want is
Pass - I - on my lit, lust be the trap for the packs
Watch wolves get snatched, on the lone for a throne
We're to a giants, like snacks
Get blew, black jack, o-bout ya taylor's
Jezebella, ballerina like a black swan
Got ya howling to the same song
As ya dead dawg, no pause on the paws, got you closed off
You won't know you in trouble 'til the claws out
Her fine printed, painted on is off with ya heart
You can do bad on ya own
Yet, you don't know to how be alone
Just cause ya got gone, got it on ya own
Don't mean ya really know
Just means ya made this far
Thus far, unless every step is of breathe
You commanded to (exhale)
While proceeding to (inhale)
Can't see in the meaning, we meeting between
You've been reading yet, thinking you thinking
While blinking, I blacked out and dipped
And hit subs in yo concious
While hiding hidden concepts in concert
Concentrate, it's the same way
Disbelief fabricates to fuel the fate
The fact you hate hypocrites
But love to hate
Connun in ya ear, drummin'
Pope hope like popo
When altars alter for forefathers
Instead of for father, the farther the heart
Of the problem gonna root deeper and harden
Pray these words help you soften
Down, down, y abajo
Bended knees on gravel on my lungs
Them tongues gon holla hallelujah god the highest
Iris fire, diadems of the highest
Iris fire, what do you desire?
Iris fire
Flip 1 to the 9, rev it up, rev it up, rev it up
Flip 1 to the deuce, rev it up, rev it up, rev it
On iris fire, iris fire
Iris fire, iris fire, hot, hot, hot, hot
Iris fire, iris fire, babe
Flip 1 to the 9, rev it up, rev it up, rev it up
Flip 1 to the deuce, rev it up, rev it up, rev it

scenes.description: Transition and introduction of the duo 'Auto-fister' (Gigi Murin and Cecilia Immergreen).
Gigi Murin and Cecilia Immergreen perform 'Auto-fister' on stage.
